name: yarg-party-queue
description: Local FIFO song request queue for YARG with LAN web UI and desktop overlay

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n server,client,overlay -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w overlay"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w overlay
